title: 光影旅程 GlimmerVoyage
description: This is a Minecraft modpack focused on exploration and photography.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AbZ3cIO9Gc0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is a Minecraft modpack centered around exploration and photography. You will step into the shoes of a photographer and embark on an adventurous journey to capture and document the unknown world.

The content includes:
- A camera photography mod that lets you become a photographer.
- Biome and terrain mods to capture stunning landscapes!
- Structure mods that enhance ecological diversity.
- Backpack and vehicle mods for easier exploration.

這是一個以探索、攝影為核心的Minecraft模組包。你將化身攝影師，踏上一場記錄未知世界的冒險旅程。

內容包括：
- 相機攝影模組，讓你化身為攝影師。
- 生態地形模組，把漂亮風景記錄下來！
- 結構模組，增加生態多樣性。
- 背包、載具模組，方便四處冒險。

模組包使用的光影 The shader used in this modpack
[https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)
